summary: REQ-4 (Therapy Scheduling) and REQ-5 (Consolidated Billing with Advance Deposits) fully tested. All backend APIs working (100%). All frontend UI elements verified. Logo updated to Tatva Ayurved custom logo in sidebar, mobile header, and invoice.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/therapy-types creates therapy type with name, category, duration, cost, gender_specific
Backend: GET /api/therapy-types returns list of therapy types
Backend: GET /api/therapy-types?category=yoga filters by category
Backend: PUT /api/therapy-types/{id} updates therapy type
Backend: DELETE /api/therapy-types/{id} deactivates therapy type
Backend: POST /api/therapy-schedules creates schedule with patient, therapy, date, time
Backend: GET /api/therapy-schedules returns list of schedules
Backend: GET /api/therapy-schedules?date=YYYY-MM-DD filters by date
Backend: GET /api/therapy-schedules?status=scheduled filters by status
Backend: GET /api/therapy-schedules/patient/{id} returns patient's schedules
Backend: PUT /api/therapy-schedules/{id}/status?status=in_progress updates status
Backend: PUT /api/therapy-schedules/{id}/status?status=completed updates status with completed_at
Backend: PUT /api/therapy-schedules/{id}/status with invalid status returns 400
Backend: POST /api/advances creates advance deposit with amount, balance, status=active
Backend: GET /api/advances returns list of advances
Backend: GET /api/advances?patient_id={id} filters by patient
Backend: GET /api/advances/patient/{id}/balance returns total_balance
Backend: POST /api/advances/apply-to-bill applies advance to bill, updates bill paid_amount
Backend: GET /api/billing/patient-summary/{id} returns consolidated summary (therapy, room, mess, advance, outstanding)
Backend: POST /api/bills creates OP bill with GST (18%)
Backend: POST /api/bills creates IP bill with room_charges, mess_charges, GST
Backend: GET /api/bills returns list of bills
Backend: GET /api/bills?status=pending filters by status
Backend: POST /api/bills/payment records payment
Frontend: Therapy Scheduling page loads with Today's Schedule and Therapy Types tabs
Frontend: Today's Schedule tab shows date filter and status filter
Frontend: Therapy Types tab shows all 5 seeded therapy types (Abhyanga, Shirodhara, Panchakarma, Basti, Nasya)
Frontend: Add Therapy Type dialog has name, category, duration, cost, gender restriction fields
Frontend: Schedule Therapy dialog has patient, therapy type, date, time, therapist, room, notes fields
Frontend: Therapy schedule cards show time, therapy name, status, patient name, cost
Frontend: Status update buttons (Start, Complete, Cancel) work correctly
Frontend: Billing page loads with Advance Deposit, Patient Summary, Create Invoice buttons
Frontend: Advance Deposit dialog has patient select, amount, payment method fields
Frontend: Patient Summary dialog shows therapy sessions, therapy charges, room charges, mess charges, advance balance, outstanding
Frontend: Auto-Fill Consolidated Bill button populates bill form from summary
Frontend: Create Invoice dialog has OP/IP tabs
Frontend: OP Bill form has consultation, treatment, other charges, discount, medicine, GST (18%) checkbox
Frontend: IP Bill form has admission/discharge date, consultation, room, treatment, mess charges, GST (18%) checkbox
Frontend: Invoice preview shows Tatva Ayurved logo (custom uploaded logo)
Frontend: Invoice preview shows hospital name, address, GSTIN, TAX INVOICE header
Frontend: Invoice preview shows charges table, subtotal, GST, grand total, amount in words
Frontend: Invoice preview shows payment status, amount paid, balance due
Frontend: Print Invoice button present in invoice preview
Frontend: Sidebar shows Tatva Ayurved logo (desktop)
Frontend: Mobile header shows Tatva Ayurved logo
Frontend: Therapies nav item present in sidebar
seed_data_creation: Therapy types seeded: Abhyanga Massage (INR 1500), Shirodhara (INR 2000), Panchakarma Detox (INR 3500), Basti Therapy (INR 2500), Nasya Treatment (INR 1000). Test therapy schedule created for today (completed). Test advance deposit created (INR 10000). Test OP and IP bills created with GST.
context_for_next_testing_agent: REQ-4 and REQ-5 fully functional. Therapy types CRUD working. Therapy scheduling with date/status filters working. Status transitions (scheduled→in_progress→completed) working. Advance deposits CRUD working with balance tracking. Apply advance to bill working. Patient billing summary consolidates therapy, room, mess charges with advance balance. OP/IP billing with GST (18%) working. Invoice preview shows custom Tatva Ayurved logo. Logo appears in sidebar (desktop), mobile header, and invoice.

details.create: POST /api/therapy-types with name, category, duration_minutes, base_cost, requires_room, gender_specific, description
POST /api/therapy-schedules with patient_id, therapy_type_id, scheduled_date, scheduled_time, therapist_id, room_id, notes
details.validations: Gender-based therapy validation, room conflict detection, therapist conflict detection

details.create: POST /api/advances with patient_id, amount, payment_method, notes

details.returns: patient, therapy_charges, therapy_sessions, therapies, room_charges, mess_charges, advance_balance, billed_total, paid_total, outstanding

details.op_bill: consultation_charges, treatment_charges, other_charges, discount, items (medicines), gst_rate, gst_amount
details.ip_bill: consultation_charges, room_charges, treatment_charges, mess_charges, other_charges, discount, items, gst_rate, gst_amount, admission_date, discharge_date

filters: Status filter (all, scheduled, in_progress, completed, cancelled)
